heroSubheadline: A personal umbrella brand connecting distinct legal and consulting services for entrepreneurs, investors and international clients.
aboutTeaser: Dr. Jörg Werner brings together legal training, entrepreneurial perspective and international advisory experience in a discreet, high-touch positioning designed for sophisticated private and corporate clients.
legalIntro: A dedicated legal services presentation for entrepreneurs, companies and international clients seeking measured, strategic and cross-border legal support.
consultingIntro: A separate consulting presentation for business coordination, relocation planning, accounting support and international advisory matters outside the scope of legal advice.
